embed.title: !userlist (admin)
embed.description: List registered users. Useful for auditing membership, spotting disabled accounts, and finding IDs for `{{prefix}}enable`/`{{prefix}}disable`.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}userlist` — every user
`{{prefix}}userlist type:discord:user` — only Discord user accounts
`{{prefix}}userlist type:discord:channel` — only Discord channel subscriptions
`{{prefix}}userlist type:telegram:user` — only Telegram users
`{{prefix}}userlist type:webhook` — only webhook destinations

fields.name: Output
fields.value: For each user: display name, ID, type, registration date, current profile, enabled/disabled status. Long lists come as a file attachment on Discord.
